revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages

revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
 |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|On the origin of species by means of natural selection|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]
|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]}} |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} The output of this template should be similar to [[:Template:Wikisource]], but allows for many links in the same box. == Required parameter(s) == The Wikisource entries are passed as unnamed parameters from 1 to 10. == Optional parameters == Parameters t1 to t10 pass text to change the text displayed for the 1st to 10th unnamed link. The parameter "object" replaces the word "article" in the template above. === Very optional parameters === The parameter "caption" replaces the entire top text if desired (this supersedes "object"). The parameter "[[leading]]" changes the distance between lines. The suffix "px" ([[:en:Pixels|Pixels]]) is required. 4px is the default. The parameter "firstleading" changes this distance only between the top (caption) text and the first link. 4px is the default. The parameters for [[:Template:Side box]] are also passed: * "position" - if set to "left" then the tag used to create the box contains class="metadata plainlinks mbox-small-left"; otherwise "-left" is omitted. * "image" feeds a replacement image for the standard Wikisource image (Size, caption, links, etc. all must be specified). * "imageright" adds an extra cell (presumably an image you specify) right of the text links. * "below" adds extra text or an image below the links. * "style" provides [[:en:HTML attribute|HTML attribute]]s to the [[style declaration]] for the table (i.e. the box) created by Side Box. * "textstyle" provides a similar style, but only to the text in the text fields and parameter "below". == Examples == {| class="wikitable" !Wiki markup !Output |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|t3=Item Three|Item Four}} |{{Wikisource-multi|Item One|Item Two|Item Three#subsection|Item Four|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |{{Wikisource-multi|object=section|leading=2px|Document/Book 1|t1=Item One|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|Document/Book 3|t3=Item Three}} |- |{{Wikisource-multi|The Descent of Man and Selection in Relation to Sex|Document/Book 2|t2=Item Two|The Zoology of the Voyage of H.M.S. Beagle|leading=5px|firstleading=2px|caption=See also [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]:|below=
[[s:Author:Charles Darwin|Part of a series of works by Darwin]]|imageright=[[Image:Hw-darwin.jpg|29px|link=s:Author:Charles Darwin]]
